---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new example, documentation page, or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: kotewar
---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement you'd like to see.

## Motivation
Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve, or what Copilot capability would it demonstrate?

## Proposed solution
Describe the change you'd like. Include file names, content ideas, or references if relevant.

## Alternatives considered
Describe any alternative approaches you've considered and why you chose the proposed solution instead.

## Additional context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.

> 💡 **Tip:** You can open this issue in Copilot Workspace to have Copilot generate a plan and implementation automatically.
